text: - h. (Division 23) Ductwork - All supply, return and exhaust ductwork systems including ductwork, flex duct, dampers, equipment, grilles, registers, diffusers, and required clearances as required by equipment and code.  In addition, the model should include vertical penetrations through structural floors.  Inclusive of insulation, linings, fittings, valves, hangers and supports, housekeeping pads, accessories, equipment, fixtures, fire smoke dampers. Required access panels shall also be modeled.
